creator: doralitze@chaotikum.org
text:
(In reply to Torsten Zuehlsdorff from comment #6)
Sorry for not being able to reply in a fast manner. I marked it as broken locally in order to fix the installation manually but this won't be a permanent solution. The build log of php71 unfortunately does not reveal any further details. Which subsystem requires the file? I created a fresh poudriere jail with a fresh ports tree and all default options, which builds it fine so maybe there are some bad options somewhere else but this is definitely strange.

Due to the upload restriction of bugzilla it is obviously impossible to upload the entire build jail. Are there any other artifacts that you'd like to inspect?
